input: Run product roadmapping on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected product roadmapping output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the product roadmapping workflow

input: Apply product roadmapping to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive product roadmapping analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to product roadmapping
